name: Palindanuwara Herb Farm
description: Discover the serene Palindanuwara Herb Farm, nestled in Kalutara’s lush hills. This historic estate offers a tranquil escape with its vibrant herb garden and traditional tea plantation. Experience the rich biodiversity and learn about the local culture through guided tours.

name: Pelawatte Spice Trail
description: Pelawatte Spice Trail, nestled in the heart of Kalutara District, offers a unique glimpse into the rich history and vibrant culture of tea cultivation. This serene estate, surrounded by lush greenery and aromatic spices, is a perfect spot for nature lovers and tea enthusiasts alike.

name: Agalawatta Tea
description: Agalawatta Tea Estate stands as a serene oasis in Kalutara District, known for its meticulously cultivated tea gardens and traditional Sri Lankan architecture. Visitors can explore the estate’s lush landscapes, learn about the tea-making process, and enjoy the tranquil atmosphere that has been cherished for generations.
activities: Explore the tea gardens, Learn about tea-making process, Relax in the estate's tranquility

name: Hantana Tea Estate

name: Corbett's Gap Estate
description: Corbett's Gap Estate stands majestically in Kandy’s Central Province, offering panoramic views of the surrounding tea plantations and verdant hills. This historic estate, steeped in colonial charm, provides visitors with a glimpse into Sri Lanka’s rich agricultural heritage.
activities: Explore tea gardens, learn about estate history, enjoy scenic views
